name: waves-codex
description: WAVES (Workers, Aggregate, Verify, Extend): wave-based orchestration for Codex. Decompose into independent slices, spawn parallel Codex subagents (or spawn_agents_on_csv) as a bounded wave, verify evidence-backed handoffs, then synthesize. The manifest is the stop function: stop only on completion, stagnation, or budget. Reduce entropy first; route scouting reads to gpt-5.6-terra low. Tuned for Codex roles, config.toml limits, codex exec fleets, and a Desktop coordinator-thread mode. Formerly parallel-orchestrate-codex.
